pages.lt: Once upon a time, in a forest full of whispers,
pages.rt: there lived a small bear named Benny.

pages.lt: Benny loved to collect golden leaves.
pages.rt: He kept them in a tiny wooden box.

pages.lt: One morning, the wind blew his box far away.
pages.rt: He chased it through the tall grass.

pages.lt: The box landed near a sparkling stream.
'I'll help you find it,' said the frog,
By sunset, Benny had his box back,
pages.rt: and a new friend beside him.

pages.lt: When the moon rose above the rooftops,
pages.rt: little Mia slipped through the garden gate.

pages.lt: Silver flowers glowed in the dark.
At the center stood an ancient tree
pages.rt: whose roots hummed an old melody.

pages.lt: Mia pressed her ear to the bark.
pages.rt: The tree told her of a hundred summers.

pages.lt: Captain Tortoise had a very small ship.
He sailed through puddles and bathtubs,
His crew: two snails and a worm.
